content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Vinculum Services: Delivery Project Manager Anywhere in the World Colorado Amazon Seller Central, ChatGPT AI Integration, and Claude.ai All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5090/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Colorado, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://thinkvinculum.com">http://thinkvinculum.com</a> </p> <p>We are looking for a sharp, self-directed <strong>Delivery Project Manager</strong> who thrives in a fast-moving agency environment. You are someone who owns our internal systems like a business partner, not someone who waits to be told what to do next. You have experience driving execution across multiple teams, holding stakeholders accountable to deadlines, and ensuring that no detail—no matter how small—ever slips through the cracks. You are organized, proactive, and comfortable being the "enforcer" who keeps our operations running like clockwork.</p> <p>If you are the kind of person who reads every detail before acting, communicates clearly in an async environment, and takes pride in running a tight operation, this is the role you have been waiting for. We are <strong>Vinculum Services</strong>, a U.S.-based e-commerce consultancy that works with Amazon brands across advertising, operations, and creative. Our project managers are the backbone of our delivery team, ensuring we act as trusted advisors to our clients rather than mere order-takers.</p> <p>We are selective about who joins our team, and our hiring process reflects that. We want people who follow through, pay attention to SOPs, and take initiative, starting with how they apply. This is an internal-facing role requiring full-time availability during <strong>U.S. Eastern Time (8am–5pm ET)</strong>.</p> <p><br>Get more details here: <a title="Delivery Project Manager" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1BJcgrsODrhELKLWXIK2ltz_tIhPyVxKE/view?usp=sharing">Delivery Project Manager - Job Description</a></p> <p><br>IMPORTANT: TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST COMPLETE THE APPLICATION FORM PROVIDED IN THE LINK ABOVE. APPLICATIONS SUBMITTED WITHOUT A COMPLETED FORM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-delivery-project-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-delivery-project-manager</a></p> Thu, 07 May 2026 16:05:17 +0000 Sat, 06 Jun 2026 16:05:17 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-delivery-project-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-delivery-project-manager Nexpanse: Product Manager (B2C Subscription Utilities) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇪 United Arab Emirates, 🇧🇾 Belarus, 🇬🇪 Georgia, 🇰🇿 Kazakhstan, 🇷🇸 Serbia, and 🇷🇺 Russian Federation Delaware A/B Testing, AI Product Development, Product Roadmapping, and Claude.ai Product Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5084/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA, Delaware <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.nexpanse.io/">https://www.nexpanse.io/</a> </p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong>Role</strong></p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">You own the product from launch. The core metric is paying users with positive unit economics.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">This is a role at the intersection of product and marketing: you grow the product by changing it — funnel, landing pages, paywall, features.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">You'll be vibecoding a lot and actively involved in product development. Your pet projects and obsession with AI coding and AI agents matter much more than years of formal experience. If you spend your evenings building your own stuff, trying to monetize it, testing ideas — that's exactly what we're looking for.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">&nbsp;</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></p> <ol class="framer-text"> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Product-led growth.</strong> Identify and ship product changes that drive growth: landing pages, funnels, paywall, features.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Performance and SEO as tools.</strong> Understand the channels (Google, Meta, TikTok, SEO), formulate hypotheses and requirements, evaluate results — without buying media yourself.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Vibecoding.</strong> Quickly build and iterate on the product (landing pages, prototypes, simple features) using no-code and AI tools. This is an ongoing process, not one-off tests.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Subscription model.</strong> Pricing, trial, paywall, retention.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Analytics.</strong> CAC, LTV, retention — understand where the economics break.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">AI and automation.</strong> Use AI to move faster: creatives, prototypes, analytics, AI agents for routine tasks.</p> </li> </ol> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who we're looking for&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text"> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Middle-level experience.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong>Russian - native language. English - A2+</strong></p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Hands-on experience with B2C subscription utilities.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Strong plus: ex-founder / solopreneur background.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Pet projects are a must.</strong> Show us what you've built yourself: an AI agent, a utility, a website, a micro-SaaS, something you've put up for sale.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p cl
